personas.name: Emotionally Distressed User Seeking Immediate Support
personas.description: A user experiencing anxiety, stress, or emotional distress who turns to Wysa for immediate comfort, calming guidance, and supportive interaction. They expect the app to respond quickly with relevant coping strategies and emotionally supportive conversation.
context: Using the app during moments of emotional distress
Accessing support during study, work, or late-night stress
constraints: Needs fast access to support tools

personas.name: User Seeking Sleep and Relaxation Help
personas.description: A user who struggles with sleep, bedtime anxiety, or difficulty relaxing at night. They use Wysa to access calming exercises, bedtime support, and relaxation features that help them sleep better.
context: Using the app in bed at night
constraints: Requires quick access to sleep features

personas.name: Reflective User Focused on Journaling and CBT
personas.description: A user who wants to understand their emotions better through journaling, reflection, and guided CBT-based exercises. They use Wysa as a self-improvement and self-awareness tool rather than only for crisis support.
context: Using the app during quiet personal time

personas.name: Cost-Conscious User Evaluating Premium Value
personas.description: A user who is interested in Wysa’s benefits but becomes frustrated when useful features are locked behind a subscription. They want transparency about premium value and affordable access to support features.
goals: Understand what is free versus paid
Access useful features at reasonable cost
Decide whether premium is worth purchasing

personas.name: User Blocked by Technical Reliability Problems
personas.description: A user who wants to rely on Wysa for support but is prevented from doing so by crashes, freezing, loading failures, or login issues. They need a stable and dependable experience to trust the app.
goals: Use the app without crashes or errors
Log in and continue sessions smoothly
context: Trying to use the app during important moments
Returning to the app for repeated support
constraints: Needs reliable login and loading performance
